reasoning: Query asks for Tohoku cherry blossom spots; tool fetches only Akita (one of 6 Tohoku prefectures). Per RULE C, Akita data is real/authoritative but scope covers ~17% of Tohoku. No sakura-filtered results visible in truncated output—general spots returned. Single dim hit: intent_understanding worst-affected.
missing_data: Iwate (Kakunodate, Kitakami), Miyagi (Hitome Senbonzakura), Fukushima (Miharu Takizakura), Aomori (Hirosaki), Yamagata sakura spots
improvement_hint: For Tohoku queries, fan out to all 6 prefectures (Aomori/Iwate/Miyagi/Akita/Yamagata/Fukushima) and filter by sakura_meisho_100 kind.

reasoning: Query asks for major sake breweries in Niigata; tool returns 24 items including sake brands/breweries (越乃寒梅, 八海山, 久保田) from Wikidata with QIDs. One caveat: query asks for breweries but response also includes non-sake items (edamame GI record). Core sake data is solid with brewery-level detail.
missing_data: Hakkaisan brewery address/website, other major brands like Koetsu, Tanrei (Niigata style explanation)
improvement_hint: Add category filter or q-param to isolate sake_brewery kind when query intent is specifically breweries.

reasoning: Query in French asks for ski resorts with hot springs in Hakuba. Tool returns Hakuba spots and includes Happo-One ski resort (correct). But onsen are not filtered or flagged in results, and response is in Japanese/English, not French. Per RULE D, constraint_handling -1 for language mismatch is the single dim hit. No onsen_ryokan items in truncated output.
missing_data: Hakuba Goryu, Tsugaike, Happo-One area onsen ryokan; thermal spring properties near ski areas
improvement_hint: Cross-join get_spots ski_resort results with get_hotels onsen_ryokan for same municipality; respect lang=fr for description fields.

reasoning: Query asks for best autumn foliage in Kansai (6+ prefectures). Tool fetches only Kyoto. Per RULE C, Kyoto alone is partial; Osaka, Nara, Hyogo, Shiga, Wakayama omitted. No koyo-specific kind filter applied—results include castles, temples unrelated to foliage. Single worst dim: intent_understanding.
missing_data: Nara (Yoshino), Hyogo (Kobe Rokko), Shiga (Hiei), Wakayama (Koyasan) autumn foliage spots; koyo-specific filtering
improvement_hint: For Kansai region queries, fan out to all 6 prefectures; apply koyo/autumn kind filter or seasonal metadata.

reasoning: Arabic query asks for famous cherry blossom spots in Kansai. Tool returns Nara spots, which is valid (Yoshino appears at top with sakura_meisho_100 kind). But query is in Arabic; response data is in ja/en only. Per RULE D, constraint_handling -1 for language mismatch. Scope is also only Nara, not all Kansai.
missing_data: Osaka, Kyoto, Hyogo cherry blossom spots; Arabic descriptions
improvement_hint: Fan out to all Kansai prefectures for region queries; ensure Arabic translation metadata is available for sakura spots.

reasoning: Query asks specifically for remote Okinawa islands (離島) with good stargazing. Tool returns general Okinawa prefecture spots dominated by Naha-area heritage sites (Nakagusuku Castle, Tamaudun). Kumejima appears (star-sand island) but no dark_sky or stargazing kind filter applied. Single worst dim: intent_understanding—離島 + 星空intent almost entirely missed.
missing_data: Iriomote, Taketomi, Yonaguni, Miyako, Kume as dark-sky islands; dark_sky or star-watching kind metadata
improvement_hint: Add dark_sky kind or star-watching metadata to remote island spots; support sub-region filtering for Okinawa離島 vs main island.

reasoning: Thai query asks for onsen accommodations in rural Hokkaido. Tool returns hito_yu_kai (secretive hot spring inns) entries for Hokkaido—excellent match for 'rural onsen' intent. Caveat: response is in ja/en not Thai, but per RULE D only constraint_handling drops; also coordinates null for several entries reduces practical usefulness. Overall strong retrieval.
missing_data: Coordinates/maps for hito_yu_kai entries; website links for booking
improvement_hint: Enrich hito_yu_kai entries with coordinates and booking URLs; consider Thai translation for description fields.

reasoning: Vietnamese query asks for Seto Inland Sea islands. Tool returns Kagawa mainland spots (Ritsurin Garden, Marugame Castle). Seto Inland Sea spans Hyogo/Okayama/Hiroshima/Ehime too; no island-specific filtering. Key islands (Naoshima, Shodoshima, Teshima) absent in visible results. Single worst dim: intent_understanding—island intent missed.
missing_data: Naoshima, Shodoshima, Teshima, Omishima, Innoshima; Okayama/Hiroshima/Ehime island spots
improvement_hint: Add island kind tag and support multi-prefecture Seto Inland Sea region query; fan out beyond single Kagawa.

reasoning: Query asks for indigo dyeing workshops in Tokushima. Tool returns METI craft records including 阿波正藍しじら織 (indigo-related textile) and 阿波和紙 (indigo-dyed paper). However, these are product designations, not workshop/experience venues—the user wants where to experience dyeing. Per RULE C, authoritative but scope gap (products vs. experiences).
missing_data: Actual workshop/experience venues for indigo dyeing in Tokushima; studio addresses and booking info
improvement_hint: Add experience_venue or workshop flag to specialty records; cross-link to municipal scrape venues offering hands-on dyeing activities.

reasoning: German query asks for Buddhist temples with shukubo on Koyasan. Tool returns Wakayama hotels and correctly surfaces multiple koyasan_shukubo entries (安養院, 一乗院, 惠光院, 北室院, 熊谷寺) from the official Koyasan Shukubo Association. Excellent match. Caveat: response in ja/en not German per RULE D, constraint_handling -1, and coordinates null for shukubo entries.
missing_data: German descriptions; coordinates for shukubo temples; price range information
improvement_hint: Add coordinate data to koyasan_shukubo entries; provide German translation metadata for shukubo descriptions.

reasoning: Query asks for off-beaten-path samurai districts outside Kyoto. Tool searches 武家屋敷 and returns 153 results including Shimane, Fukui, Akita (Kakunodate with strong description). Kakunodate result has excellent description noting weeping cherry blossoms and heritage designation. One caveat: Tokyo result included (not 'outside Kyoto' intent) but this is minor given 153 diverse results.
missing_data: Aizu Wakamatsu, Kanazawa Nagamachi, Chiran samurai districts
improvement_hint: Support prefecture exclusion filter; boost preservation_district + buke_yashiki combination in ranking.

reasoning: Indonesian query asks for summer festivals in Akita. Tool returns get_festivals for Akita with lang=id. Response is in Indonesian (good constraint handling). However only 3 items returned (Dainichido Bugaku, Kakunodate Festival, Tsuchizaki Shinmei). Missing famous Akita summer festivals like Kanto Festival (竿燈まつり). Coverage is sparse for a prefecture famous for summer matsuri.
missing_data: Kanto Festival (竿燈まつり, UNESCO-listed), Nishimonai Bon Dance, Omagari Fireworks summer context
improvement_hint: Add Akita Kanto Festival to bunka_intangible or events data; improve summer festival coverage for major Tohoku events.

reasoning: Korean query asks for small fishing port towns in Sanin (山陰) region. Tool returns Shimane general spots (Lake Shinji, Matsue Castle, Iwami Ginzan). No fishing port or harbor town results visible. Sanin also includes Tottori. Single worst dim: intent_understanding—fishing village intent almost entirely missed with generic landmark results.
missing_data: Yunotsu (温泉津), Oki Islands, Tottori fishing ports; fishing_port or harbor kind metadata
improvement_hint: Add fishing_port/harbor kind tags; fan out Sanin region query to include Tottori alongside Shimane.

reasoning: Query asks where to experience washi paper making in Gifu. Tool returns METI craft category for Gifu (8 items) but none specifically for washi—results include Mino Ware (ceramics), Hida Shunkei (lacquer), Nagiso Rokuro (wood), with no 美濃和紙 visible in truncated output. Per RULE C, authoritative data with topical filter gap. Washi is a key Gifu craft but may not appear in top results.
missing_data: 美濃和紙 (Mino Washi, designated traditional craft); workshop venues in Mino City
improvement_hint: Prioritize washi kind in results when query contains 和紙; add experience/workshop cross-link to specialty records.

reasoning: Spanish query asks for fishing villages in Noto Peninsula. Tool returns Ishikawa prefecture spots dominated by Kanazawa (Kanazawa Castle, Kenroku-en, Oyama Shrine)—all Kanazawa city content, not Noto Peninsula. No sub-prefecture filtering to Noto. Single worst dim: intent_understanding—Noto Peninsula fishing village intent completely missed.
missing_data: Wajima, Sosogi coast, Noto Satoyama/Satoumi (UNESCO Globally Important Agricultural Heritage), Machino fishing port
improvement_hint: Support municipality-level filtering for Noto Peninsula; add fishing_village or coastal_village kind tags for Noto spots.

reasoning: Query asks for lesser-known sand dunes beyond Tottori. Tool searches 砂丘 and returns 91 results including non-Tottori sand dunes (Ishikari in Hokkaido, Fukiagehama in Kagoshima, Onjuku Beach in Chiba). Tottori appears at top but diverse results follow. One caveat: some results are beaches tagged sand_dune rather than true dune formations, slightly inflating the set.
missing_data: Nakatajima Sand Dunes (Hamamatsu), Sarobetsu Plains dunes (Hokkaido)
improvement_hint: Distinguish sand_dune (true dune geomorphology) from beach with sandy components in kind taxonomy.

reasoning: Chinese query asks for traditional crafts of Sanin region. Tool returns Shimane crafts in zh (石见烧, 石州和纸, 云州算盘, 出云石灯笼) with Chinese descriptions. Language constraint respected. One scope caveat: Tottori crafts (e.g., 因州和紙, 弓浜絣) omitted as Sanin includes both Shimane and Tottori. Per RULE C, single-prefecture scope is partial but authoritative.
missing_data: Tottori crafts: 因州和紙, 弓浜絣; Tottori included in Sanin 山陰 region
improvement_hint: Map Sanin (山陰) region query to both Shimane and Tottori prefectures with region_fanout.

reasoning: Query asks for lavender fields in Hokkaido beyond Furano. Tool returns general Hokkaido spots with no lavender_field kind filter—results dominated by Showa-shinzan volcano, Sapporo Clock Tower, Matsumae Castle. No lavender-specific content visible. Single worst dim: intent_understanding—lavender field intent entirely missed.
missing_data: Tomita Farm (Furano), Lavender East, Nakafurano lavender fields; lavender_field kind metadata
improvement_hint: Add lavender_field kind to Hokkaido flower-field spots; support seasonal flower query routing to relevant kind filters.

reasoning: Filipino query asks for traditional townscapes (古い町並み) in Kyushu. Tool returns Oita spots (Usuki Castle, Usa Shrine, Oka Castle). Oita is one Kyushu prefecture; query scope is all Kyushu. More critically, no preservation_district or townscape-filtered results visible—mostly castles/shrines. Single worst dim: intent_understanding—traditional townscape intent and Kyushu-wide scope both missed.
missing_data: Hita Mameda-machi (Oita), Yanagawa (Fukuoka), Chiran (Kagoshima), Yame (Fukuoka) traditional districts
improvement_hint: Fan out Kyushu region to all 7 prefectures; filter by preservation_district/jokamachi kinds for 古い町並み queries.

reasoning: Japanese query asks for kominka (古民家) accommodations in Hokuriku region. Tool returns Ishikawa hotels with hito_yu_kai onsen ryokan and standard hotels. No kominka or machiya lodging type visible. Hokuriku also includes Fukui, Toyama, Niigata; only Ishikawa queried. Single worst dim: intent_understanding—kominka accommodation intent not matched, standard hotels and onsen ryokan returned instead.
missing_data: Kominka lodging in Kanazawa, Fukui (Ono, Sakai), Toyama; machiya_inn lodging_type
improvement_hint: Add kominka/machiya_inn as lodging_type; support Hokuriku region fan-out to Fukui/Toyama/Ishikawa.

reasoning: Query asks for mountain shrines on Kii Peninsula. Tool returns Wakayama Japan Heritage with top_canonical_heritage including Kongōbu-ji (Koyasan), Kumano Kodō (UNESCO pilgrimage), and Kumano Sanzan—all core Kii Peninsula mountain worship sites. One caveat: some items (Negoro-ji) are more Buddhist temples than mountain shrines; tool_scope_note correctly warns about UNESCO/Japan Heritage distinction.
missing_data: Nachi Taisha waterfall shrine, Yoshino (Mie/Nara part of Kii Peninsula pilgrimage)
improvement_hint: Extend to fan out Mie and Nara for Kii Peninsula queries; clarify mountain_shrine kind in kinds taxonomy.

reasoning: Query asks for fireworks festivals along Sea of Japan coast. Tool returns Niigata festivals (129 items) and 長岡まつり大花火大会 appears (correct, major summer fireworks). But query scope is the entire Sea of Japan coast (Niigata, Akita, Toyama, Ishikawa, Fukui, Tottori, Shimane, etc.); only Niigata fetched. Also, first items are spring flower events not fireworks—ranking buries the core fireworks result. Per RULE B, coverage gap is primary failure.
missing_data: Omagari Fireworks (Akita), Miyazu Tango Fireworks, Shikijima Fireworks along Sea of Japan coast
improvement_hint: Fan out Sea of Japan coast to multiple prefectures; add fireworks kind filter to surface hanabi events above general festival results.

reasoning: Query asks for traditional bamboo crafts in Oita. Tool returns 2 METI craft items including 別府竹細工 (Beppu Bamboo Crafts)—an exact match with detailed description of 8 weaving techniques and Madake bamboo. The other item (Hakata Ori) is a textile shared with Fukuoka, less relevant. One caveat: only 2 items total is slim but Oita's official bamboo craft designation is correctly captured.
missing_data: Workshop venues for 別府竹細工 experience; Beppu Bamboo Craft Museum address
improvement_hint: Cross-link specialty designations to experience venues (museums/workshops) for practical trip planning.

reasoning: Query asks for cycling routes in rural Shikoku. Tool returns Ehime spots. 大三島 (Omishima) appears with cycling_route kind—a direct match for the query intent. However the response is dominated by castles (Ozu, Yuzuki, Uwajima) with no cycling-specific metadata highlighted. Shikoku also spans Kagawa, Kochi, Tokushima. Per RULE C, partial match with scope gap; cycling intent only minimally served.
missing_data: Shimanami Kaido route details, Kochi cycling routes, Tokushima cycling paths; cycling_route kind filtering
improvement_hint: Support cycling_route kind filter for get_spots; fan out Shikoku region to all 4 prefectures for region queries.

reasoning: Query asks where to see kabuki outside Tokyo/Kyoto. Tool returns all traditional arts (183 items) with kabuki at position 2—correct designation but no venue/location data. Kabuki entry is just a UNESCO-level category record without performance venues. The 183-item list with Bunraku first and unrelated UNESCO arts following does not help find performance locations. Per RULE B, single worst: practical_usefulness—correct data but not usable for trip planning.
missing_data: Kabuki performance venues outside Tokyo/Kyoto: Kotohira Kabuki (Kagawa), Nagahama Kabuki (Shiga), regional kabuki theater addresses and schedules
improvement_hint: Link kabuki_theater kind spots from get_spots to traditional arts entries; add venue cross-reference for performing arts records.
